# Delhivery SDK

> TypeScript SDK for the Delhivery B2C logistics API. Zero runtime dependencies, native fetch, dual ESM/CJS, fully typed.

## Install

```
npm install delhivery-sdk
```

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://delhivery-sdk.pages.dev/)
- [Installation](https://delhivery-sdk.pages.dev/installation)
- [Authentication](https://delhivery-sdk.pages.dev/authentication)

## API Reference

- [Serviceability — pincode check + TAT](https://delhivery-sdk.pages.dev/api/serviceability)
- [Orders — create, update, cancel, e-waybill](https://delhivery-sdk.pages.dev/api/orders)
- [Tracking — real-time shipment tracking](https://delhivery-sdk.pages.dev/api/tracking)
- [Shipping — cost calc, waybills, labels, pickup](https://delhivery-sdk.pages.dev/api/shipping)
- [Warehouses — pickup location management](https://delhivery-sdk.pages.dev/api/warehouses)
- [NDR & RVP QC — non-delivery & reverse pickup](https://delhivery-sdk.pages.dev/api/ndr)
- [Documents — label/invoice/POD downloads](https://delhivery-sdk.pages.dev/api/documents)
- [Webhooks — real-time event handling](https://delhivery-sdk.pages.dev/api/webhooks)

## Guides

- [Create Your First Order](https://delhivery-sdk.pages.dev/guides/create-first-order)
- [COD Orders](https://delhivery-sdk.pages.dev/guides/cod-orders)
- [Bulk Operations](https://delhivery-sdk.pages.dev/guides/bulk-operations)
- [Error Handling](https://delhivery-sdk.pages.dev/guides/error-handling)
- [Webhooks Setup](https://delhivery-sdk.pages.dev/guides/webhooks-setup)

- [FAQ](https://delhivery-sdk.pages.dev/faq)
